LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 11, 2016 AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE MS. RODRIGUEZ THE OPPORTUNITY TO FILE AN OPPOSITION. MS. RODRIGUEZ IS ORDERED TO FILE OPPOSITION NO LATER THAN FRIDAY JUNE 24, 2016. DISCOVER BANK MUST APPEAR AT THE NEXT HEARING UNLESS THEY HAVE CONFIRMED WITH MS. RODRIGUEZ THAT SHE WILL NOT APPEAR. JUDGE: SUZANNE BOLANOS. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MAY $6,849.68 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,849.68, - (JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2018 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2018 Continued To Aug-21-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Attorney, Alisa J. Kim (510-736-6293), for plaintiff/moving party, Discover Bank
May Rodriguez (415-748-1165), defendant/opposing party In Propria Persona

PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT is called for hearing. Court hears from both sides. Court confirms its tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 664.6 is granted. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (D302)

MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-10-2016 Continued To Jul-11-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Defendant May Rodriguez telephone number 415-398-5408 in Propria Persona.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that no opposition was filed. Ms. Rodriguez stated that she did not know she had to file an opposition. The matter was passed to the end of the calendar. When the matter was recalled, the Defendant was no longer present. The Court noted that Discover Bank did not appear and made reference to language in the tentative ruling (If the tentative ruling adversely affects, in whole or in part, any party who is not represented by an attorney, then any other party (whether represented by an attorney or not) may submit on the tentative ruling without appearing for the hearing only if the adversely affected self-represented party has stated in writing or orally that he or she will not appear at the hearing). That contact was not done. The tentative ruling is vacated and PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT is continued to July 11, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 to give Ms. Rodriguez the opportunity to file an opposition. Ms. Rodriguez is ordered to file opposition no later than Friday June 24, 2016. Discover Bank must appear at the next hearing unless they have confirmed with Ms. Rodriguez that she will not appear.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/SB)
